description: Release gate thresholds for HPA/KEDA scalability validation.

queue_depth_max.description: Peak queue depth observed during the load test window.

p95_latency_ms.description: p95 request or job completion latency under load.

oscillation_count.description: Number of scale direction changes (up/down) during the scenario.

scale_up_time_seconds.description: Time from sustained saturation to first healthy scale-up.

scale_down_time_seconds.description: Time from sustained low utilization to first scale-down.
